member.name: T:Agents.Sample.INumberReportAnalyzer
member.summary: Defines the contract for building a summary report from a number sequence.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.INumberReportAnalyzer.BuildReport(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Generates a report containing aggregate metrics and grouped values.
member.returns: A typed report object with status and computed metrics.

member.name: T:Agents.Sample.BadStyle
member.summary: Builds a summary report for a sequence of numbers.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.BuildReport(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Generates a report containing aggregate metrics and grouped values.
member.returns: A typed report object with status and computed metrics.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.CreateMissingReport
member.summary: Returns a report with status "missing" when no input was provided.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.AggregateNumbers(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Iterates through all numbers and accumulates totals, extremes, and bucketed values.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.UpdateExtrema(Agents.Sample.NumberAggregation,System.Int32)
member.summary: Updates minimum and maximum values on the aggregation for the given input.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.AppendBuckets(Agents.Sample.NumberAggregation,System.Int32)
member.summary: Classifies a value into even/odd buckets, appends it to text, and updates sliding windows.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.AppendFirstFive(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Append a value to the first-five collection, up to 5 items.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.AppendLastFive(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Int32)
member.summary: Append a value to the last-five collection, maintaining at most 5 items (sliding window).

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.BadStyle.CreateCompletedReport(Agents.Sample.NumberAggregation)
member.summary: Builds the final NumberReport from a completed aggregation.

member.name: T:Agents.Sample.NumberReport
member.summary: Represents the generated summary for a number sequence.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Count
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of items processed.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Total
member.summary: Gets or sets the sum of all values.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Average
member.summary: Gets or sets the arithmetic mean of all values.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Min
member.summary: Gets or sets the smallest value encountered.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Max
member.summary: Gets or sets the largest value encountered.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Evens
member.summary: Gets or sets the even numbers from the input.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Odds
member.summary: Gets or sets the odd numbers from the input.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.FirstFive
member.summary: Gets or sets up to the first five values encountered.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.LastFive
member.summary: Gets or sets the last five values encountered (sliding window).

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.ValuesAsText
member.summary: Gets or sets each value serialised as a string.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.GeneratedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the report was generated.

member.name: P:Agents.Sample.NumberReport.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the processing status: "ok" or "missing".

member.name: T:Agents.Sample.NumberAggregation
member.summary: Internal accumulator used during report construction.

member.name: T:Agents.Sample.mixedSeveritySample
member.summary: Demonstrates mixed-severity architecture and style findings for agent validation.

member.name: M:Agents.Sample.mixedSeveritySample.BuildSummary(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Builds a compact summary string from input numbers.
member.returns: A summary containing count and average.
